title: High Valuations Are Concerning: Robert Kindler
description: Robert Kindler is one of the top M&A dealmakers in the United States with an illustrious career advising deals that included Comcast, Time Warner, Dow Chemical, Viacom and United Airlines. Kindler, global chair of M&A at Paul Weiss, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals" to discuss the state of M&A in 2026, crypto, valuations, balance sheets and how executives approach deals.  (Source: Bloomberg)
